_comment: Edit this file to update the dashboard's Trending This Week. Commit & push — Cloudflare auto-deploys. 'key' is the Open Library work key (e.g. /works/OL27448W); 'cover_i' is the Open Library cover id; 'badge' is one of: 'hot' | 'rising' | 'new'.
